title: wedelia induta
intro: Wedelia induta, also known as the wedelia plant, is a type of flowering herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, recognized for its medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Wedelia induta include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. The plant's medicinal properties can be utilized through herbal preparations such as tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed for its therapeutic benefits.
